name: Orbifold for (2,3,7) triangle group

conePoints.name: P (π/7 vertex)
conePoints.description: 7-fold cone point — center of each heptagon

conePoints.name: Q (π/3 vertex)
conePoints.description: 3-fold cone point — vertex where three heptagons meet

conePoints.name: O (π/2 vertex)
conePoints.description: 2-fold cone point — midpoint of each {7,3} edge

mirrors: The three geodesics bounding the fundamental triangle are the reflection mirrors
Together they generate the full (2,3,7) group

torsionFreeSubgroup.quotient: Closed hyperbolic surface of genus 3 (the Klein quartic)

orbifoldStructure.description: The orbifold is topologically a disk with three cone points of orders 2, 3, 7

relatedOrbifolds.description: Triangle group orbifolds approaching the cusp as n→∞
Orbifold for Escher's Circle Limit IV

wallpaperAnalogy.description: Orbifold notation unifies Euclidean wallpaper groups and hyperbolic triangle groups
wallpaperAnalogy.euclideanOrbifolds: 17 wallpaper groups correspond to orbifolds with χ = 0
wallpaperAnalogy.reference: Thurston, W.P. (1997). Three-Dimensional Geometry and Topology, Ch. 13
